name: claude-memex
description: Claude-maintained wiki — hook-enforced documentation discipline and LLM-owned knowledge base for any project

plugins.name: memex
plugins.description: A Claude-maintained wiki for any project — hook-enforced documentation discipline, LLM-owned knowledge base, ingest/query/lint loop, plus optional self-hosted browsable docsite (memex-docsite). Ships SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, and Stop hooks
